headline: AI stocks tumbling, another day of tech turmoil
detail: Broad AI and tech names are selling off again, with no clear bottom yet. This hits your entire book - PLTR, AVGO, CRWD, SMH, QQQ, and QQQI all live in this space. On margin, a sector-wide down day doesn't just hurt one position, it pressures your whole account simultaneously.

headline: OpenAI IPO timeline uncertainty spooks tech
detail: Uncertainty around OpenAI's IPO is adding a new overhang to AI-driven stocks. PLTR and CRWD both carry heavy AI narrative premiums in their valuations, making them vulnerable when AI sentiment sours. This is a sentiment driver, not a fundamental fix - it can linger.

headline: SpaceX FOMO is over, space stocks getting punished
detail: The headline directly calls out space stocks being sold across the board, which hits your two newest positions - SPCX (brand-new IPO, very volatile, limited data) and SPAL (2x leveraged, meaning losses compound daily through decay). Both were already in the red before this; today makes it worse.

headline: Friday is one of the biggest volume days of the year
detail: High-volume days can exaggerate moves in either direction - a relief bounce gets bigger, but so does a continued selloff. With PLTR flagged SELL and AVGO flagged TRIM, a high-volume down day Friday could push both closer to your stop levels fast.
